title: 7Z File Extractor
description: Extract files from 7Z archives online instantly and securely.

faq.question: How do I extract a 7Z file?
faq.answer: Upload your 7Z file to Converigo, and the contents will be extracted and ready for download immediately.

faq.question: Is the extraction secure?
faq.answer: Yes, files are processed securely on our servers and automatically deleted after extraction.

faq.question: What file sizes are supported?
faq.answer: 7Z files up to 500MB can be extracted instantly on Converigo.

faq.question: What is the difference between 7Z and ZIP?
faq.answer: 7Z provides better compression than ZIP, making it ideal for large file collections and backups.

faq.question: Are password-protected 7Z files supported?
faq.answer: Yes, password-protected 7Z files can be extracted with the correct password.

faq.question: Do you support solid archives?
faq.answer: Yes, solid 7Z archives are fully supported for extraction.

faq.question: What if extraction fails?
faq.answer: Ensure the 7Z file is not corrupted and try re-uploading if extraction fails.

faq.question: Can I extract 7Z files on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, Converigo works on all modern browsers on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

about_formats.title: What is a 7Z file?
about_formats.text: 7Z is a modern archive format known for excellent compression ratios and strong security features. It's the native format for 7-Zip, a popular open-source archiver.

about_formats.title: Why extract a 7Z file?
about_formats.text: Extracting 7Z files lets you access the original contents, modify files, and view the archive structure without needing 7-Zip installed.

about_formats.title: 7Z compression benefits
about_formats.text: 7Z achieves superior compression compared to ZIP, making it excellent for backups and file distribution.

cta.title: Extract 7Z files in seconds
cta.text: Upload your 7Z archive and get all files instantly.
